envVars.name: AION_API_KEY
envVars.description: Main AION API key used by the skill.

envVars.name: AIONMARKET_API_KEY
envVars.description: Legacy alias supported by the script when AION_API_KEY is not set.

envVars.name: MARKET_ID
envVars.description: Target market id for automated runs.

envVars.name: VENUE
envVars.description: Venue filter for reads and trades, such as polymarket or kalshi.
